class.name: CircleWire
class.description: [CircleWire] builds a circular closed wire on an optional [CadPlane]. The curve remains an analytic OpenCASCADE circle until callers explicitly sample it.

method.name: build_circle
method.description: Builds a circular wire of [param radius] on [param plane]. If [param plane] is omitted, the global XY plane is used and the plane origin becomes the circle center.
